title: Amistad Summer: Anthony Hopkins And Morgan Freeman Ready Decca Debuts
summary:
Amistad fans rejoice! Next month, Anthony Hopkins and Morgan Freeman, lead actors from Steven Spielberg's 1997 historical drama, will release their own individual projects on Decca. It was announced today that Sir Anthony Hopkins signed to Decca Classics as a composer and will release his musical project Life Is A Dream, performed by Grammy Award-winning conductor Gustavo Dudamel and the Philharmonia Orchestra, on August 21.

The post Amistad Summer: Anthony Hopkins And Morgan Freeman Ready Decca Debuts appeared first on Stereogum.

fullArticle:
Amistad fans rejoice! Next month, Anthony Hopkins and Morgan Freeman, lead actors from Steven Spielberg's 1997 historical drama, will release their own individual projects on Decca. It was announced today that Sir Anthony Hopkins signed to Decca Classics as a composer and will release his musical project Life Is A Dream, performed by Grammy Award-winning conductor Gustavo Dudamel and the Philharmonia Orchestra, on August 21.

This announcement comes a month after Freeman announced his 12-song collection Morgan Freeman’s Symphonic Blues Experience, out August 7. It was announced on Juneteenth with the first single "Death Letter Blues." Freeman narrated and produced the project that features blues innovators Taj Mahal, Keb’ Mo’, Lawrence “Boo” Mitchell, and Shemekia Copeland. The album also ...
